questions.question: What is the minimum age to register on the marketplace?

questions.question: What is the customer support email address?
How many pick-up attempts will Kibuga make for a return?
How long do I have to send something back?
Can a teenager open an account?
questions.answer: No - you may not register if under 18 years of age

questions.question: What paperwork do I need to bring back a purchase?
questions.answer: Proof of purchase, original packaging, any free promotional items

questions.question: Which goods can't be sent back?
questions.answer: Innerwear, swimsuits, gym wear, sleep wear, perfumes, jewelry, health & wellness products, adult toys

_evidence.matched: innerwear swimsuits gym wear sleep wear perfumes jewelry health wellness products adult toys

questions.question: How do I get in touch if something goes wrong?
questions.answer: Customer Service Call Center 0742511381/0742511394, or support@kibuga.com

questions.question: How long does a refund take to process?
questions.answer: The process may take up to 2 days from when the return request was submitted

_evidence.matched: the process may take up to 2 days from when

questions.question: What happens if my return claim is rejected?
questions.answer: If the claim is invalid the item will be sent back to you

_evidence.matched: if the claim is invalid the item will be sent back to you

questions.question: What kinds of content am I forbidden from posting?
questions.answer: Offensive, obscene, indecent, pornographic, lewd, suggestive, sexually explicit; violence; blasphemous or hateful content

_evidence.matched: offensive obscene indecent pornographic lewd suggestive

questions.question: What personal data does Kibuga collect?
questions.answer: Personal data collected when you visit the website or mobile applications

questions.question: What warranty does a seller give about the products?
questions.answer: Seller warrants good title, sole legal and beneficial owner, no third-party rights or restrictions

questions.question: Can Kibuga suspend my account without telling me?
questions.answer: We may suspend or cancel your account at any time in our sole discretion and without notice or explanation

_evidence.matched: at any time in our sole discretion and without notice or explanation

questions.question: What is the full returns procedure from request to refund?
questions.answer: Contact call centre, 3 pickup attempts in 2 working days, quality check, refund per requested method within 2 days

questions.question: What are all the ways Kibuga can refund me?
questions.answer: Store credits, wallet refunds, vouchers, mobile money transfer, bank transfers

_evidence.matched: store credits wallet refunds vouchers mobile money transfer bank transfers
